title: Note Frontmatter (DRAFT — Phase 0 skeleton)
$comment: Skeleton. Finalize fields per note type in Phase 1. Domain-neutral only.

id.description: Stable, sortable, filename-safe id (e.g. ULID). Durable key for links/chunks.

layer.description: Memory layer L0-L5. raw=0 is immutable.

source_ref.description: Provenance: id of the raw capture / source this note derives from.

links.description: Outgoing [[wikilink]] targets (also seeds the graph index).

secure_ref.description: Optional pointer to external secure storage (secref_...). Never inline sensitive content.
